title: Snow Basin Overnight
subtitle: Snow Basin, Utah — May Campout with the Crew
summary:
## Snow Basin Overnight — May 8–9, 2026

Great turnout for this one. Five strong: Dad, Keishin, Perrin, Cole, and Alex. We set up two tents — a three-man and a two-man — and settled into camp easy. The hike in was short, which made it a solid pick for the newer folks in the group.

## Food

Hotdogs over the fire and frozen meals with chicken. Simple and it hit the spot — no complaints from anyone.

## Camp Life

Alex came through with a deck of cards and got a game going. Perrin, Cole, Alex, and Keishin all played and had a good time with it.

## The Fire Situation

Cole and Alex volunteered to build the fire — first real campfire experience for both of them. They kicked things off by putting the kindling on top of the wood instead of underneath, which made for a long troubleshooting session and plenty of jokes at their expense. After much deliberation and creative problem-solving, they cracked the code and got a solid fire going. A rite of passage.

## Overall

Everyone had a great time. Good crew, good food, short hike that kept things approachable for first-timers. One of those trips where everything just works.
